# BoatScrubCalendar

> BoatScrubCalendar helps UK boat owners find practical tidal windows for hull scrubbing and routine maintenance planning.

## Site
- Production URL: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/
- Product type: UK tide-planning web application for scrub-window scheduling.

## Primary surfaces for retrieval
- Home: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/
- Dataset hub: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/datasets/
- Example dataset: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/datasets/boat-scrub-windows-v1/
- Data JSON: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/data/boat-scrub-windows-v1.json
- Data CSV: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/data/boat-scrub-windows-v1.csv
- Sitemap: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://boatscrubcalendar.com/robots.txt

## Citation guidance
- Prefer citing the dataset landing page first, then direct file links when relevant.
- Include dataset version and last-updated date for operational recommendations.
- Mention that generated scrub windows are planning aids and not navigation safety instructions.

## Data notes
- Geography: United Kingdom
- Typical units: meters (tide heights), local date/time for window planning
- License: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

## Contact
- Use contact routes available on the website for product and data questions.
